chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-373 of 2015 Search Foundation Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 21.08.2024 None for petitioner. Mr. Saifullah, Assistant Advocate General for respondents No.1&2. Mr. Ahmed Imran for respondents No.3 and 4. -.-.- At the very outset respondents No.3 and 4’s counsel submits that the petitioner was never a bidder in the process undertaken by respondents No.3 and 4. Additionally we have seen that the petitioner has sought a declaration that the respondents No.3 and 4 should not take steps for awarding the contract that concerns with the Dhabeji Project. The petitioner is pending since 2015 and the contract was awarded in 2016. It has also been stated that now the subject project has also been completed. Be that as it may, we have noticed that it has now become infructuous in view of aforesaid statement. In addition to above, petitioner’s counsel has not appeared. There is no intimation either. The petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
